content.text: Lint clean (only pre-existing legacy warnings). All required acceptance criteria met: - **B1**: `/chat/page.tsx` is a server component, exports `metadata` with `title="Chat"` and a one-line RAG/grounding description, renders `` (client). - **B2**: `ChatSurface` uses `Container size="narrow"`, flex column, `min-height: calc(100dvh - 56px - var(--s-6))` (header + breathing room), with `ChatHeader` → `ChatMessageList` (flex 1, overflow-y auto) → `ChatInput` (sticky bottom). - **B3**: Heading "Ask my LLM about my work", 1–2 sentence subhead about citing the corpus and not being the user, plus "What's grounding this →" link to `/about#llm`. - **B4**: Form with auto-resizing textarea (rows={2}, maxLength=4000, placeholder), `Cluster` containing solid/accent submit Button labeled "ask" (disabled until canSubmit) and `{charCount} / 4000` (used `chat-input__count` per existing class conventions; semantic equivalent). Enter submits, Shift+Enter newlines, disabled while streaming. - **B5**: `ChatSurface` sets `document.body.dataset.page = "chat"` on mount; `chat.css` hides `.shell-footer` via `body[data-page="chat"]`. - **Non-goals respected**: no session sidebar, no model picker, no auto-focus on textarea. Files created: `src/components/llm/{ChatSurface,ChatHeader,ChatInput,ChatMessageList}.tsx`, `src/styles/chat.css`. Modified: `src/app/chat/page.tsx`, `src/app/globals.css` (added chat.css import). IMPL_RESULT: PASS
